mapper.sql: select template_id, template_name, course_id, template_type, rule_json, publish_status, status from sc_exam_strategy_template
mapper.select: and template_name like concat('%', #{templateName}, '%')and course_id = #{courseId}and template_type = #{templateType}and publish_status = #{publishStatus}and status = #{status} order by template_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sc_exam_strategy_template(template_name, course_id, template_type, rule_json, publish_status, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{templateName}, #{courseId}, #{templateType}, #{ruleJson}, #{publishStatus}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_exam_strategy_template template_name = #{templateName},course_id = #{courseId},template_type = #{templateType},rule_json = #{ruleJson},publish_status = #{publishStatus},status = #{status},update_by = #{updateBy},remark = #{remark},update_time = sysdate() where template_id = #{templateId}
mapper.delete: delete from sc_exam_strategy_template where template_id in #{templateId}
